issues.message: Gemini did not return a usable production intent.

actual.error: intent lost or altered explicit millimeter values from the user request: [1000.0, 420.0, 120.0]; intent moved or altered source measurements bound to global_outer_diameter: [1000.0]; star_arc_1 direct required-anchor realization predicts a minimum curvature radius of 3.92718 mm but at least 60 mm is required after deterministic handle optimization (factors [0.4, 0.5, 0.5, 0.4]). Redistribute or add well-separated relative anchors so each direction change is spread over more distance; star_arc_2 relative first waypoint must advance along the incoming tangent before the lateral freeform turn; axial projection is 0 mm for incoming heading [0.707107, 0.707107, 0.0] and first offset [80.0, -80.0, 0.0]. Make that offset a positive parallel multiple of the incoming heading; star_arc_2 relative first waypoint is too close/off-axis for a regular tangent entry: its circular-entry radius is 56.5685 mm but at least 60 mm is required. Move the first anchor farther along the incoming tangent before turning; star_arc_2 relative waypoint chain contains a zero-length tangent or 180-degree cusp; redistribute the anchors

next_actions: Fix INTENT_EXTRACTION_FAILED: Gemini did not return a usable production intent.
